seoTitle: Wills vs Wilson Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wills and Wilson Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wills vs Wilson Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wills and Wilson Beach.
heading: Wills vs Wilson Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wills, Queensland and Wilson Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wills has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Wilson Beach (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wills or Wilson Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wills has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Wilson Beach scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wills scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Wilson Beach scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wills or Wilson Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
